description_long: This bungalow features a rustic log cabin aesthetic with a prominent wooden exterior and a complex, multi-gabled roof. The front facade is defined by a wide porch with steps leading up to the main entrance, flanked by large windows that allow ample natural light. The structure sits on a stone or concrete foundation, slightly elevated above a grassy yard. The roof is constructed from dark brown shingles, and the log walls are interlocked at the corners, emphasizing traditional craftsmanship. The rear and side views reveal additional covered porch areas and a consistent use of natural materials throughout. The overall design is spacious and horizontally oriented, with a single story and a strong connection to the surrounding landscape.
description: A single-story log bungalow with a multi-gabled shingle roof, wide porch, and large front windows, set on a stone foundation with a grassy yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide porch, main entrance steps, and large windows beneath the multi-gabled roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the bungalow, the layered roof structure, and the grassy yard extending from the foundation.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional porch space, consistent log construction, and more windows along the back facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the extended roofline, side porch, and the elevation of the building above the yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
